# [Command] _netappfiles cache list-peering-passphrase_

This operation will list the cluster peering command, cluster peering passphrase and the vserver peering command

## Versions

### [2026-01-01](/Resources/mgmt-plane/L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMve30vcmVzb3VyY2Vncm91cHMve30vcHJvdmlkZXJzL21pY3Jvc29mdC5uZXRhcHAvbmV0YXBwYWNjb3VudHMve30vY2FwYWNpdHlwb29scy97fS9jYWNoZXMve30vbGlzdHBlZXJpbmdwYXNzcGhyYXNlcw==/2026-01-01.xml) **Stable**

<!-- mgmt-plane /subscriptions/{}/resourcegroups/{}/providers/microsoft.netapp/netappaccounts/{}/capacitypools/{}/caches/{}/listpeeringpassphrases 2026-01-01 -->

#### examples

- Caches_ListPeeringPassphrases
    ```bash
        netappfiles cache list-peering-passphrase --resource-group myRG --account-name account1 --pool-name pool1 --cache-name cache-1
    ```
